$comment: markdownlint over AGENTS.md + .github/contributing/*.md (#54; one-time formatting sweep in #214). Off BY CHOICE: MD013 (line length — long lines are fine in these guides), MD033 (inline HTML — <sub>, <details>, etc. are used on purpose), MD060 (table-column-style — 110 hits across the report/maintenance tables; a cosmetic reflow not worth the churn). Everything else runs on default and now passes: the #214 sweep reflowed whitespace (MD022/031/032/012), and the bare ASCII-tree / template / diagram fences are tagged `text` (MD040). One justified MD038 exception is inline-disabled in maintenance.md.
